creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Squidclamav is constantly crashing:

Wed May 28 10:28:23 2014, main proc, Child 40957 did not exit normally.Wed May 28 10:28:23 2014, main proc, signaled with signal:10
Wed May 28 10:28:23 2014, main proc, Child 40958 did not exit normally.Wed May 28 10:28:23 2014, main proc, signaled with signal:10

I have contacted program author, he asked me to test a few modified versions but the problem remained. Finally he instructed me to switch to linux, as he thinks problems are FreeBSD-related.
